name: rent-vs-buy
description: Decide rent vs buy: nominal-then-deflated simulation of BUY vs RENT net worth across horizons, with the headline real home-appreciation break-even rate, invest-the-difference both directions, mortgage payoff/crossover, and federal LTCG + NIIT tax overlay. Thin orchestration over the public planfi MCP (https://ai.planfi.app/mcp).
